title: RBI Proposes Removal of NPA Condition for Including Quarterly Profits in CET1 Capital
description:
The draft removes the restriction linked to NPA provisioning for including quarterly profits in CET1 capital. It simplifies capital adequacy calculations while retaining prudential safeguards.
The post RBI Proposes Removal of NPA Condition for Including Quarterly Profits in CET1 Capital appeared first on TaxGuru.
